message:
refactor(parser): introduce document-level AST for flowchart parsing

Decouple flowchart parsing from IR lowering by introducing an
intermediate document representation (FlowDocumentItem,
FlowDocumentParseResult). Subgraph blocks are now parsed recursively
into a tree structure rather than tracked via mutable stacks, which
makes the nesting semantics explicit and enables future multi-pass
processing.

Key changes:
- Add FlowDocumentItem enum (Statements / Subgraph with recursive body)
- Add FlowDocumentParseResult with items + warnings
- Add From<NodeToken> for FlowAstNode conversion
- Add parse_flowchart_document / parse_flowchart_document_items for
  recursive descent over lines
- Add parse_flowchart_statement_asts to produce AST nodes without
  touching IrBuilder
- Add parse_edge_statement_asts returning Vec<FlowAst> edges
- Refactor parse_class_assignment -> parse_class_assignment_ast
  (returns Option<FlowAst> instead of mutating builder)
- Refactor parse_click_directive -> parse_click_directive_ast
  (returns Option<FlowAst> instead of mutating builder)
- Add direction directive parser (direction LR/RL/TB/TD/BT) to
  flow_statement_parser
- Add lower_flow_document_item to walk the document tree and lower
  into IR
- Add test: flowchart_direction_statement_updates_graph_direction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
